title: Comment from Rocha, David, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
ASTP/ONC should assess real time and push notifications using FHIR APIs with serverless processing, durable streaming (like Kafka and Pulsar), and real time analytics (like Spark and Flink)

journal article Reference:
 Tools and techniques for real-time data processing: A review

https://journalijsra.com/sites/default/files/fulltext_pdf/IJSRA-2025-0252.pdf
